title: The Going
content:
(R.B.)


    He's gone.
    I do not understand.
    I only know
    That as he turned to go
    And waved his hand,
    In his young eyes a sudden glory shone,
    And I was dazzled with a sunset glow,
    And he was gone.
meaning:
Wilfrid Wilson Gibson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Going"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
